title: Dashboard - automatically add all Boards within a Workspace
excerpt: I need to create dashboards for workload management, and to give us a snapshot view of all active projects. But boards are constantly being created and archived, so it’s not realistic to manually update the dashboard wit…

posts.author: hannaDW (Hanna Wenter)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to create dashboards for workload management, and to give us a snapshot view of all active projects. But boards are constantly being created and archived, so it’s not realistic to manually update the dashboard with the latest boards. I need all boards within a workspace to automatically be included in a dashboard, and for the dashboard to update automatically as boards change. Without this functionality, the dashboards require too much manual management to be useful.

posts.author: kzedmonds (kim)
posts.cookedHtml: I am facing a similar issue. It would be nice to either automate the addition of a board to a dashboard, or to just include all the boards in a workspace.

posts.author: jackjack2202 (Jack Kubicek)
posts.cookedHtml: I could see many use cases for something like this! Has my vote.

posts.author: cdf (Carrie d.)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree - this would be extremely helpful as the dashboard becomes redundant unless being scrubbed for inclusion of newly added boards.

posts.author: marlena.stepien (Marlena Stepien)
posts.cookedHtml: I also think this feature would be helpful. Many of my colleagues ask if it’s possible to add boards automatically.

posts.author: mbarbey (Matt Barbey)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes. This feature seems like one everyone would need if you are going to manage a group of projects and team members. Can we get this ASAP?

posts.author: Johnny (Johnny Morse)
posts.cookedHtml: Really great idea - my team would love to see this to help manage operations across multiple boards.

posts.author: ameliamym (Amelia)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there an update on the timeline for this feature Monday team? This would be a great feature for us too.

posts.author: longlive289s (Michael)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ya my agency is looking to add a project mgmt software and this was one of the first things I tried to setup.

This would be incredibly helpful feature…voted!

posts.author: fcollay (Faye Collay)
posts.cookedHtml: 100000% has my vote! Painful connecting every signal board.

posts.author: Kandace (Kandace Swaisland)
posts.cookedHtml: So disappointed, the dashboards are one of the main reasons we went with Monday and they are basically useless unless you can automate the addition of boards. And why would it be restricted to 25 boards??? You are essentially restricting yourself to corporations that run less then 25 projects!!!

posts.author: Mindflows_Jesuena (Jesuena Estoque Reimer)
posts.cookedHtml:
I 100% agree that this feature could be very useful.
I have several ideas where this could be beneficial:

1.) When an item is created then create a board from template and connect this board to a certain dashboard

2.) When a new board is created in this group, connect this board to a certain dashboard

Something like that would be great Looking forward to further developments!

Jesuena Estoque Reimer
CEO | Senior Monday.com Consultant
https://mindflows.eu

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: This is an interesting suggestion you bring up! The only roadblock here is that each plan has a specific amount of boards supported per dashboard, so automatically adding all boards within a workspace would be depended on the plan and how many boards actually sit in the workspace. Alternatively, would you be interested in the process to add boards (from workspaces) be better formatted, so that you are able to bulk add a specific amount of boards to the one dashboard?

posts.author: Somnio (Somnio)
posts.cookedHtml: The best option is not to have to remember to connect boards to all dashboards. Not having the correct data present on various dashboards leads to teams and managers not being on the same page. With the standard plan, you get unlimited boards so I am not sure what you mean various plans only allow for so many boards?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Apologies for causing any confusion @Somnio! Whilst an unlimited amount of boards is supported in each plan, in terms of dashboards, a different amount of boards per dashboard is supported.

  • Basic is able to add 1 board to a dashboard
  • Standard is able to add 5 boards to a dashboard
  • Pro is able to add 20 boards to a dashboard
  • Enterprise is able to add 50 boards to a dashboard

Let me know if this makes sense!

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @BiancaT , Is the limit for boards per dashboard 10 or 20 for the pro plan? You said 20 here, but on the pricing feature list it says 10.

posts.author: MitchB (Mitch Blobstein)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you post a screenshot on how to automate this with a templated project plan board please?

posts.author: jvallee (Joshua Vallee)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would also like to see how to automate adding a board to a dashboard from a template.
If that can be done it would be nice when the project is marked as completed it could remove the board from the dashboard.

posts.author: ikyu_72 (Stacy)
posts.cookedHtml: Additionally, when creating a new dashboard, the list of boards from which to select is recent and only shows some, why not at least make the list show all available boards? Currently I have to remember the name of all the boards to search and them, or open a second window to reference.

posts.author: AnanyaM09 (Ananya Mandal)
posts.cookedHtml: Now that the 2024 roadmap includes adding more boards to a dashboard, is this functionality going to be re-visited at all? We really would like to set up an automation such that a board of a certain type/with certain logic can be automatically added to a dashboard.

posts.author: josuexvolt (Josh Cruz)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Ananya, do you know where can I find the 2024 roadmap?

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml: When will this be available? To connect more boards. @BiancaT

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,

Thank you for being patient with me - I apologise for the delay in my response

That said, whilst subject to change, the plan is to support greater board connections in dashboards is for Q3 - stayed tuned for further updates!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: https://monday.slack.com/archives/CTH46N4RL/p1709080948204259

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,

In addition to my recent update, I wanted to also mention that specific to this feature request, automatically adding boards from a workspace to a dashboard is a functionality planned for Q3 too

posts.author: carlylaine (Carly )
posts.cookedHtml: This would be great. AND/OR the ability to automate a board from a template to be connected to a dashboard. Would be SO helpful with our project template boards for real time reporting.

posts.author: NW90 (Nick Westphal)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca, do you have any updates regarding the automatic connection of new created boards to a dashboard. That would be extremely helpful for our use case. Thanks for your reply!

posts.author: i.moreno (Ignacio Moreno Ortega [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!,
I am part of the Decadis team and I would like to recommend you our application, Batch Hero for monday

In particular, to the section of the Batch operations . Batch Hero empowers you to manage multiple boards simultaneously . Whether you’re copying , moving , changing ownership , archiving , or deleting boards

If you need assistance on how to use the application, please, feel free to create a request in our support portal , we will be happy to help you.

Best regards,
Nacho

posts.author: NikkiVH (Nikki Visser-Haanstra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Is there any news about this feature request (automatically adding boards from a workspace to a dashboard) that was planned in Q3?

Hoping to hear from you.

Sincerely,
Nikki

posts.author: Samantha_CF (Samantha Merrill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Bianca,

Is there any update regarding when the functionality to automatically add all boards in a workspace to a dashboard is set to be released?

Also is there any plan to increase the number of boards you can pull into a dashboard. We have a Enterprise plan so can currently do 50 but need to be able to pull at least 100 or more if possible. How would it work if your workspace was set to pull into a Dashboard but exceeded the board max for the dashboard?

Thanks!
Samantha

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you are open to using apps then take a look at our app Master Data. Connecting as many boards as you would like to a Master Boards is its number 1 selling point imo. We made it extremely affordable as well. You can either create a chart view (and share a link to the view), or connect you single master board to a dashboard.

posts.author: Samantha_CF (Samantha Merrill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bruce,

Thank you for the feedback! This looks promising but I do have one concern. How would this affect MyWork? For example, if I created a master board pulling all 150 boards from a workspace into a single board so I could then populate that board into the Dashboard in questions, would it also create duplicate tasks for all my team members thus making their MyWork (todo list) look twice as long and possible affecting how things pull into their MyWork (since it is also limited it how much data it can pull). Let me know what you think!

Thanks
Samantha

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Samantha, you do bring up a legitimate point that I never considered, as our team has too many items for My Work… to work … You can ask everyone with access to the Master Board to remove the Master Board from the My Work settings (you can tick on and off boards to be included), or If they don’t have access to the Master Board then it wouldn’t pull the synced items into My Work. I would love to see the My Work limit increased which I bet already is a feature request.
